pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 17 migration and modernize the framework stack.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 17 as a baseline and lacks compatibility with Spring Framework 6, causing runtime failures or missing APIs when running on JDK 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 17 to enforce compilation and runtime against the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compiling with Java 8 settings on a Java 17 JDK may lead to compatibility issues with newer libraries (like Spring Boot 3) that require Java 17+ features or bytecode versions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add dependency management for thymeleaf-extras-springsecurity4 to resolve version conflicts or ensure compatibility with the new Spring Security version in Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Migrate servlet API import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: The javax.servlet package is no longer available in Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+ environments, causing a compile error (package not found) if not updated.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Migrate Spring Security HTTP DSL from the deprecated fluent API to the lambda-based API introduced in Spring Security 5.7+.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: The fluent API methods (e.g., .antMatchers(), .authorizeRequests() without lambda) are deprecated in Spring Security 5.7 and removed in Spring Security 6.0 (required for Spring Boot 3.x), causing compilation errors or runtime failures if not updated.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Replace deprecated .antMatchers() with .requestMatchers() in Spring Security configuration.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: .antMatchers() is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7 and removed in Spring Security 6.0, leading to compilation errors on Spring Boot 3.x.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Replace deprecated .regexMatchers() with .requestMatchers() in Spring Security configuration.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: .regexMatchers() is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7 and removed in Spring Security 6.0, leading to compilation errors on Spring Boot 3.x.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Replace deprecated antMatchers with requestMatchers in WebSecurity configuration.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: antMatchers is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7+ and removed in Spring Security 6 (Spring Boot 3), causing compilation errors or runtime warnings depending on strictness.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Replace deprecated antMatchers with requestMatchers in HttpSecurity authorization configuration.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: antMatchers is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7+ and removed in Spring Security 6 (Spring Boot 3), causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Migrate HttpSecurity configuration from chained builder style to lambda DSL style.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: The chained builder style (e.g., .and()) is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7+ and removed in Spring Security 6 (Spring Boot 3), causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Migrate logout configuration from chained builder style to lambda DSL style.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: The chained builder style (e.g., .and()) is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7+ and removed in Spring Security 6 (Spring Boot 3), causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Migrate formLogin configuration from chained builder style to lambda DSL style.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: The chained builder style (e.g., .and()) is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7+ and removed in Spring Security 6 (Spring Boot 3), causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Migrate httpBasic configuration from chained builder style to lambda DSL style.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: The chained builder style (e.g., .and()) is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7+ and removed in Spring Security 6 (Spring Boot 3), causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Migrate servlet API import from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.servlet.http does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3).
